rows.label: tev032601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev032601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Giogion about Lu's shop.

rows.label: tev032601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev032601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Giogion if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev032601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Giogion if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0001
rows.name:
With enough miranium, it looks
like you'll have no trouble opening
slots in your gear, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Once you've found a favorite, you probably
want to bust those slots open and and
power it up to the max, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0003
rows.name:
That Lu is a real artist, don't you
think? That's one beauty of a machine...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0004
rows.name:
Do you think I could talk him
into designing one that converts
miranium into pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0008
rows.name:
My sister Niilop was on the
ship with us, but I haven't
seen her for for months, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0009
rows.name:
Once she finds an object of study, she goes full hermit,
you follow? You don't see her for months, then she
finally emerges from seclusion looking thin and pale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Anyway, she sent a message to my comm device
about a company here in the city that picked
her up. I wonder which one it was...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0011
rows.name:
If you see her, tell her to drop
by Lu's shop and say hello to
her brother, if you would?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0027
rows.name:
I just saw my sister Niilop
for the first time in ages.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0028
rows.name:
I hadn't seen her for so long
that I practically forgot what
she looked like, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0029
rows.name:
Anyway, I guess some Larsian
was after her or something?
She looked totally exhausted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0030
rows.name:
Since I'm a good brother, I told her she should
get out, exercise more, and build up some some
endurance. All good advice, wouldn't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_JNK1010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev032601_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Giogion about Lu's shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0031
rows.name:
Ah, it's my favorite artist Lu!
Don't worry, okay? I'm taking
good good care of the shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0032
rows.name:
You just get out there and see
the sights of Mira, all right?
Light that imagination on fire![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0033
rows.name:
I know you'll concoct all kinds of
crazy machines inside that gold mine
you you call a brain, won't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0034
rows.name:
And the first one will be a
machine that converts miranium
into pizza, right? ...Right?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032601_MSG0035
rows.name:
Er, that was me doing the subliminal
thing, you know? Pizza machine, please?[ST:wait ]
